MINI MINUTES: KEVIN SOLAN APPEARING FOR DAVID WINDREM. NO APPEARANCE BY THE MOVING PARTY OR THE ATTORNEY. THE MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED PETITION IS DENIED. THE PETITION IS NOT TIMELY. Petition To Revoke Admission Of Purported Will To Probate And Contest Of Purported Will.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth Hansen appearing for contestant. Kevin Solan appearing for executor/respondent. Mediation was unsuccessful. Trial will take more than 8 hours. Court is referring this matter to the Presiding Judge for trial date. Order signed. Ms. Hansen will be filing a Motion to Amend Petition. Issue on Discovery cut off date argued. Counsel will need to go to Discovery Department for discovery issues. Motion to Amended petition is set for hearing on 6/27 at 1:30pm. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Revoke Admission Of Purported Will To Probate And Contest Of Purported Will.
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Continued To Apr-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Solan appearing for executor/respondent. Elizabeth Hnsen appearing for contestant. Discovery is pending. Court is referring case to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 3/30. Counsel can sumbit ex parte request to continue if necessary. Matter is continued to 4/3 for status after mediation. Court is keeping the 4/27 and 4/28 trial date. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
